definition.en: Your will is your intent. All of the power of your being is mobilized by your will, which makes its deductions according to your beliefs about reality.
definition.zh: 你的意志就是你的意图。你整个存有的所有力量都由你的意志所调动，而你的意志则根据你对实相的看法做出推论。

definition.en: Free will is a necessity. The leeway given allows him to materialize his ideas, meet them in physical experience, and evaluate for himself their particular kind of validity.
definition.zh: 自由意志是必要的。所给予的余地让他能够将他的想法具体化，在物质经验中遇见它们，并亲自评估它们那种特定的有效性。

definition.en: Within certain limits there is free will. Yet these limits themselves were set, or if you prefer, chosen, by the entity itself for any given present personality; and at the entity level free choice or free will is much more extensive, and really has much more meaning.
definition.zh: 在特定限制之内，有自由意志。然而这些限制本身是由存有本身为任何给定的当前人格所设定，或者如果你愿意，也可以说是所选择的；而在存有层面，自由选择或自由意志要广泛得多，而且确实具有多得多的意义。

definition.en: The conscious will is robbed of its power to act. Such lives exist simultaneously. They are other expressions of yourself, interacting, but with each conscious self possessing the point of power in its own present.
definition.zh: 有意识的意志被剥夺了行动的力量。这样的生命是同时存在的。它们是你自己的其他表达，彼此互动，但每个有意识的自我都拥有其自身当下的力量点。

definition.en: The reasoning mind is highly necessary, effective, and suitable for physical existence, and for the utilization of free will, which is very dependent upon perception of clearly distinguishable actions.
definition.zh: 推理心智对于物质存在以及对于自由意志的运用是高度必要、有效且适合的，而自由意志非常依赖于对清晰可辨的行动的感知。

explanation:
意志是人格在特定存在层面上的自我决定能力，但它并非绝对无限的自由。自由意志受到神经结构、时空框架和价值实现的内在限制——人格必须在其被投射到的特定层面上获取经验，无法选择其他层面。这些限制实际上是人格自身在更高层面（存有层面）上主动选择的，在那里自由意志更为广泛和有意义。

意志与想象力并非对立关系。当两者冲突时，想象力会跟随意志和意识信念。意志的核心功能是组织行动，将无限可能道路中的私人冲动引导向最适合个体发展的表达途径。没有这种引导，自由意志在实践层面几乎无法运作，因为过多的选择会使任何决定都变得不可能。

内在的求生意志至关重要，它需要被重新激活。自由意志的存在是创造个人现实的前提，

quotes.text: He has free will to make any decisions that he is able to make (intently). This means that his free will is contained, given meaning, focused, and framed by his neurological structure. He can only move, and he can only choose therefore to move, physically speaking, in certain directions in space and time. That time reference, however, gives (underlined) his free will meaning and a context in which to operate. We are speaking now of conscious decisions as you think of them.
quotes.translation: 他拥有自由意志，能够（专注地）做出任何他能做的决定。这意味着他的自由意志受到神经结构的约束、赋予意义、聚焦并框定。就肉体而言，他只能移动，因此也只能选择在时空中的特定方向移动。然而，那个时间参照系（强调）赋予了他的自由意志意义和运作的脉络。我们现在讨论的是你所认为的有意识决定。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The personality is on its own, with what you may call the power of self-determination and free will. If you had thoroughly remembered our material on value fulfillment, you would know that the only detriment to so-called free will is the built-in necessity for value fulfillment. The personality must gain experience, in other words, on a particular level of existence, on which or within which it operates, and it cannot choose otherwise. It must experience existence on the particular level on which it has been projected.
quotes.translation: 人格是独立的，拥有你所谓的自决力和自由意志。如果你彻底记住了我们关于价值完成的资料，你就会知道对所谓自由意志的唯一损害，是价值完成的内在必要性。换言之，人格必须在它运作的特定存在层面上获得经验，它无法做其他选择。它必须体验它被投射到的那个特定层面的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Within certain limits there is free will. Yet these limits themselves were set, or if you prefer, chosen, by the entity itself for any given present personality; and at the entity level free choice or free will is much more extensive, and really has much more meaning.
quotes.translation: 在一定限度内存在自由意志。然而，这些限度本身是由存有本身为任何给定的当前人格所设定，或者如果你愿意，也可以说是选择的；在存有层面，自由选择或自由意志要广泛得多，而且确实具有更多意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Through the centuries philosophical and religious thinkers have created numerous complicated variations of ideas involving free will and determinism, so that neither thesis is as simple as it first appears to be. Man related the concept of free will long ago to the question of whether he could deliberately choose evil, for example. He still does. And he still struggles with questions about his freedom before God's omnipotence and foreknowledge, and whether those qualities cause events, or can cause them, and whether they involve predestination. Opposing determinism is the idea that man has always fought for his personal responsibility--that instead of being controlled entirely by his heritage, he's capable of forming new syntheses of thought and action based upon the complicated patterns of his own history.
quotes.translation: 几个世纪以来，哲学和宗教思想家们创造了无数关于自由意志与决定论的复杂变体，因此这两种论点都不像最初看起来那么简单。例如，人类很久以前就将自由意志的概念与他是否能蓄意选择邪恶的问题联系起来。他至今仍如此。他仍在挣扎于关于他在上帝的全知全能面前是否自由的问题，以及这些特质是否导致事件、能否导致事件，以及它们是否涉及预定论。与决定论相对的是，人类一直为其个人责任而奋斗——即他并非完全受遗传控制，而是能够基于自身历史复杂模式，形成新的思想与行动综合。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now: Much has been written saying that if imagination and willpower are in conflict, imagination will win. Now I tell you, if you examine yourself you will find (deeper and louder) that imagination and willpower are -- underlined twice -- in conflict. Your beliefs may conflict, but your imagination will always follow your willpower and your conscious thoughts and beliefs.
quotes.translation: 许多著作都说过，如果想象力和意志力发生冲突，想象力会获胜。现在我告诉你，如果你审视自己，你会发现（更深沉、更响亮地）想象力和意志力——双重划线——是冲突的。你的信念可能冲突，但你的想象力永远会追随你的意志力以及你有意识的念头和信念。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Many limitations are set upon personalities by their own entities for karmic reasons. I want to make it plain that free will does exist, but that it is limited through use of a more extended free will on the part of the entity. Also, the inner ego is aware of so-called future decisions not because he forces such decisions upon the outer ego but simply because the future as such does not exist to the inner ego, and therefore he can perceive where the outer ego cannot.
quotes.translation: 许多限制是由人格自身的存有因业力原因而设定的。我想明确说明，自由意志确实存在，但它通过存有一方更扩展的自由意志的使用而受到限制。此外，内在自我之所以知道所谓的未来决定，并非因为它将这些决定强加于外在自我，而仅仅是因为未来对内在自我而言并不存在，因此它能看见外在自我无法看见之处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Predictions, per se, do not contradict the theory of free will, though free will is dependent upon much more than any freedom of the ego alone. If the ego were allowed to make all the choices, with no veto power from other layers of the self, you would all be in a sad position indeed.
quotes.translation: 预言本身并不与自由意志理论相矛盾，尽管自由意志所依赖的远不止自我意识的自由。如果允许自我意识做出所有选择，而自我其他层面没有否决权，你们确实会陷入可悲的境地。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now. What you call karma has meaning only in basic terms within your particular plane. I do not want to get too complicated. Nevertheless personalities on your plane work out individual problems within that plane through various existences. Here we have also free will, but a continuity so to speak of purposes. No purpose is forced upon any personality. He, the personality, adopts in various reincarnations upon your plane those purposes most in keeping with his own needs. And for Marks sake may I say that levels of existence do not necessarily imply higher or lower levels, but concentric levels, even as the layers of the subconscious do not imply upper and lower levels, but are merely terms used for the sake of simplicity.
quotes.translation: 你们所谓的业力，在你们特定层面内仅具有基本意义。我不想说得太复杂。然而，你们层面的人格通过不同存在形式，在该层面内解决个体问题。这里我们同样拥有自由意志，但可以说存在目的的连续性。没有任何目的是强加给任何人格的。他，即人格，在你们层面的各种转世中，采纳那些最符合自身需求的目的。看在马克份上，容我说一句：存在层次未必意味着高低层级，而是同心圆层次，正如潜意识层次并非指上下层级，仅为简化术语。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Those of you who believe in reincarnation in more or less conventional terms, can make the error of using or blaming "past" lives, organizing them through your current beliefs. It is bad enough to believe that you are at the mercy of one past, but to consider yourself helpless before innumerable previous errors from other lives puts you in an impossible situation; the conscious will is robbed of its power to act. Such lives exist simultaneously. They are other expressions of yourself, interacting, but with each conscious self possessing the point of power in its own present.
quotes.translation: 那些或多或少以传统方式相信转世的人，可能会犯下利用或指责"过去"生活的错误，通过当前信念来组织它们。相信受制于一个过去已经够糟，但若认为自己无力面对来自其他生命的无数先前错误，则会使你们陷入不可能之境；有意识的意志被剥夺了行动的力量。这些生命同时存在。它们是你们自我的其他表达，相互互动，但每个有意识的自我在其自身当下都拥有力量之点。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

related_concepts.name_en: The point of power is in the present

quotes.text: Your beliefs tell you, again, that the body is primarily a mechanism--a most amazing machine, but a machine (louder), without its own purpose, without any intent, a mindless assembly plant of assorted parts that simply happened to grow together in a certain prescribed fashion. Science says that there is no will, yet it assigns to nature the will to survive--or rather, a will-less instinct to survive. To that extent it does admit (underlined) that the machine of the body "intends" to insure its own survival--but a survival which has no meaning beyond itself. And because [the body] is a machine, it is expected to decay after so much usage.
quotes.translation: 你们的信念再次告诉你们，身体主要是一台机器——一台最惊人的机器，但仍是机器（提高音量），没有自身目的，没有任何意图，一个无意识的零件组装厂，只是恰好以某种规定方式组合在一起。科学说没有意志，却赋予自然生存意志——或者说，一种无意志的生存本能。在某种程度上，它确实承认（强调）身体这台机器"意图"确保自身生存——但这种生存本身没有超越自身的意义。因为[身体]是机器，所以经过如此多使用后理应衰败。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The entire idea of reincarnation has been highly distorted by other religious concepts. It is not a psychological arena composed of crime and punishment. Again, you have free will in the conditions of your life, given the characteristics that are your own. The great facility and adaptability of the human species are dependent upon an amazing interplay between genetic preciseness and genetic freedom. The very characteristic attributes of the species, its dependability and integrity, are dependent upon constant checks and balances, the existence of divergent characteristics against which the species can measure itself.
quotes.translation: 转世的整体概念已被其他宗教观念严重扭曲。它并非由罪与罚构成的心理竞技场。再次强调，在你们生命条件中，鉴于你们自身特质，你们拥有自由意志。人类物种的巨大灵活性和适应性，依赖于基因精确性与基因自由之间惊人的相互作用。该物种特有的属性、其可靠性和完整性，依赖于持续的制衡机制，以及物种可据以衡量自身的差异性特征的存在。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You reason out your position. Otherwise your free will would have no meaning in a physical framework, for the number of choices available would be so multitudinous that you could not make up your mind to act within time. With all the opportunities of creativity, and with your own greater knowledge instantly available, you would be swamped by so many stimuli that you literally could not physically respond, and so your particular kinds of civilization and science and art could not have been accomplished--and regardless of their flaws they are magnificent accomplishments, unique products of the reasoning mind.
quotes.translation: 你必须为自己的立场找出理由。否则你的自由意志在物质架构中便毫无意义，因为可供选择的选项会多到让你无法在时间内下定决心行动。面对所有创造的机会，以及你自身随时可得的更高知识，你会被如此众多的刺激淹没，以至于根本无法做出身体上的回应——这样你们特有的文明、科学与艺术便无法成就——尽管它们存在缺陷，却仍是辉煌的成就，是理性心智的独特产物。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Earlier I mentioned several times that we must reach a point at which you are able to see around the corner of seemingly contradictory material,21 and this is one of those occasions. (Long pause.) Time overlays present you with a picture in which you have free will--yet each event that you choose will have its own time version. Now those time versions may be entirely different one from the others, and while you certainly initiate your own time version, in terms of usual understanding there is no true place or time in which that version can be said to actually originate (again with emphasis).
quotes.translation: 早些时候我多次提到，我们必须达到一个能让你看清看似矛盾材料背后真相的节点，现在正是这样的时刻之一。（长停顿。）时间版本为你呈现了一幅画面：你拥有自由意志——然而你选择的每个事件都会拥有自己的时间版本。这些时间版本可能彼此截然不同，虽然你确实开启了自身的时间版本，但以通常的理解而言，并没有一个真正的地点或时间可以说这个版本确实起源于那里（再次强调）。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I may add here that they chose to renew this relationship, that is, free will operating in this case as in all others. There are always varieties of personal problems to be worked out, but the time, place and relationship is left to choice. For that matter, a personality can choose to ignore the problems completely, though this is at best a cowardly solution and simply holds the personality back. There is very much detail involved here. Needless to say, Throckmorton could have tried to make reparation to his daughter in a variety of ways, and not necessarily by being her husband.
quotes.translation: 我在此补充说明，他们选择重续这段关系——也就是说，自由意志在此案例中与其他所有情况一样运作。总有各种个人问题需要解决，但时间、地点和关系都留待选择。就此而言，人格可以选择完全忽略这些问题，尽管这充其量只是懦弱的解决方式，只会阻碍人格发展。这其中涉及许多细节。毋庸置疑，斯洛克莫顿本可以尝试以多种方式向女儿赎罪，而不一定非要成为她的丈夫。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There are many times that our paths have crossed, and that is why I wanted you here, and why you happened onto the art gallery where Ruburt is employed. Not that free will is not involved, because it certainly is involved. Only that old friends have a way of meeting. And I was not joking when I spoke of a predisposition to gout, for you have also been lecherous in your way.
quotes.translation: 我们的道路曾多次交汇，这就是为什么我希望你在这里，为什么你碰巧来到鲁柏工作的画廊。并非自由意志没有参与——它当然参与其中。只是老朋友总有相遇的方式。当我提到你易患痛风时并非开玩笑，因为你也有自己好色的方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: On several occasions I have communicated my willingness in particular circumstances. I knew more about those circumstances than Ruburt. Some of these occasions occurred fairly early in our sessions, when Ruburt was worried about spontaneous trances, so after making my presence known to him, I acquiesced to his decision at the time. On a few occasions certain conditions have been poor. Usually Ruburt reacted to these adversely at his end -- that is, the interference was such that it would bother his situation rather than mine.
quotes.translation: 有几次我表达了在特定情况下的意愿。我对那些情况的了解比鲁柏更多。其中一些情况发生在我们课程早期，当时鲁柏正为自发性出神状态担忧，所以在我让他感知到我的存在后，我默许了他当时的决定。有几次条件不佳。通常鲁柏会在他那端产生不良反应——也就是说，干扰影响的是他的处境而非我的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You choose ahead of time your environment and purposes. This greater personage then has earthly counterparts, each individual alive taking part in the vital human drama of any given century. Each learns from the others, and the counterparts fit together like mosaics -- except that these mosaics are fully endowed with independence and free will. So the individuals alive upon the body of the earth at any given time fit together as beautifully as the cells do within your individual body at a particular time (most emphatically).
quotes.translation: 你提前选择了自己的环境和目标。这个更宏大的角色随后拥有尘世对应体——每个活着的个体都参与着任何特定世纪的人类重要戏剧。每个人从他人身上学习，这些对应体像马赛克一样拼合——只不过这些马赛克被充分赋予了独立性和自由意志。因此，在任何特定时间生活在地球躯体上的个体，其组合之美妙程度，恰如特定时刻你个体身体内的细胞组合（极其强调）。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Time, in your terms, is plastic. Most predictions are made in a highly distorted fashion; they can lead the public astray. Not only that, but when the predictors fall flat on their faces it does not help "The Cause." Reality does not exist in that fashion. You can tune in to certain probabilities and predict "that they will occur," but free will always operates. No god in a giant ivory tower says, "This will happen February 15 at 8:05." And if no god predicts, then I do not see the point of doing so myself.
quotes.translation: 以你们的时间来说，时间是可塑的。大多数预言都是以高度扭曲的方式做出的；它们可能误导公众。不仅如此，当预言者彻底失败时，这对"事业"毫无帮助。实相并非以那种方式存在。你可以调准到某些可能性并预言"它们将会发生"，但自由意志始终在运作。没有哪位神祇坐在巨大的象牙塔里说："这件事将在2月15日8点05分发生。"如果连神都不预言，我看不出自己有什么理由这么做。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Such inner data makes its impression upon the physical brain and changes the personality as does any experience. In many cases such inner experience is retained in your memory cells. If you would simply for once, and for once Joseph I am not referring to you particularly, if you would for once demonstrate an openness and a willingness to accept such data on its own basis, without insisting upon evidence from the regular senses, then and only then will you have evidence that the outer senses can recognize.
quotes.translation: 这类内在数据如同任何经验一样，会在物质大脑上留下印记并改变人格。在许多情况下，这种内在经验会保留在你的记忆细胞中。如果你能仅仅一次——约瑟夫，我这次不是特指你——如果你能仅仅一次展现出开放态度和意愿，以它自身为基础接受这类数据，而不坚持要求常规感官的证据，那么只有到那时，你才会拥有外在感官能够识别的证据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The objects in the physical universe are but symbols to express other realities existing within private realms. The inner will always be projected outward within your system. If, for example, a letter comes to you bearing good news, and you react to the letter with high spirits, then you should understand that the high spirits existed first, and created the materialization of the letter within the physical systems, through the multilayered and complicated reactions that bind together the physical system.
quotes.translation: 物质宇宙中的物体只是符号，用以表达存在于私人领域内的其他实相。内在之物在你的系统内总是会向外投射。例如，如果一封信带来好消息，而你以高昂的情绪回应这封信，那么你应该明白，高昂的情绪首先存在，并通过连接物质系统的多层复杂反应，创造了这封信在物质系统内的物质化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The reasoning mind is highly necessary, effective, and suitable for physical existence, and for the utilization of free will, which is very dependent upon perception of clearly distinguishable actions. In the larger framework of existence, however, it is simply one of innumerable methods of organizing data. A psychological filing system, if you prefer.
quotes.translation: 推理心智对于物质存在以及自由意志的运用是高度必要、有效且适合的，而自由意志非常依赖于对清晰可辨行动的感知。然而，在更广阔的存在框架中，它只是组织数据的无数方法之一。如果你愿意，可以称之为一种心理归档系统。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Ruburt directed his will in certain areas. Your will is your intent. All of the power of your being is mobilized by your will, which makes its deductions according to your beliefs about reality. Each of you use your will in your own way. Each of you have your own way of dealing with challenges. Ruburt used his will to solve [a series of] challenges.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏在某些领域引导了他的意志。你的意志就是你的意图。你存在的所有力量都由你的意志调动，而意志则根据你对实相的信念做出推论。你们每个人都以自己的方式运用意志。你们每个人都有自己应对挑战的方式。鲁柏运用他的意志解决了一系列挑战。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I also know that in a couple of chapters for Dreams itself Seth referred to the genetic factors involving reincarnation. He said that basically both our genetic structure and our reincarnational history are systems of consciousness, that they're "intermixed." The former is physical, the latter is psychic, a part of our inner bank of knowledge. I don't doubt that he's right--that is, in our temporal lifetimes we call upon whatever systems of consciousness we desire to, at whatever "time": a matter of choice and free will operating within the broad parameters of our sexual orientation and other personality factors.
quotes.translation: 我也知道，在《梦》的几章中，赛斯提到了涉及转世的遗传因素。他说，基本上我们的遗传结构和我们的转世历史都是意识系统，它们是"相互混合的"。前者是物质的，后者是心灵的，是我们内在知识库的一部分。我不怀疑他是对的——也就是说，在我们现世的生命中，我们可以在任何"时间"召唤我们想要的任何意识系统：这是在性取向和其他人格因素的广泛参数内运作的选择和自由意志的问题。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You are in no danger however as long as you pursue your present course, but you are in peril as soon as you change it. You will find that these loose predictions will come to pass. You understand that free will always operates, this being a foregone conclusion. I also am practical in my way. And speaking of practicality, you would find it most beneficial even in dealing with your precious camouflage patterns if you would develop the use of your inner senses.
quotes.translation: 只要你坚持当前的道路，便毫无危险；但一旦改变方向，便陷入险境。你会发现这些松散的预言终将应验。你明白自由意志始终在运作，这是不争的事实。我自有我的务实之道。说到务实，若你善用内在感官，即便处理那些珍贵的伪装模式，也会发现大有裨益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: They may have been "cured" whether or not they had treatment, and gone on to lead productive lives. You do not know. A man or woman who is ready to die, if saved from one disease will promptly get another, or find a way of fulfilling that desire. Your problem there rests with the will to live, and with the mechanics of the psyche. The complete physician would try to understand the inner mechanics of vitality and, as best he could, learn to encourage these.
quotes.translation: 无论是否接受治疗，他们可能早已"痊愈"，并继续过着富有成效的生活——你无从知晓。一个决心赴死之人，即便从某种疾病中获救，也会迅速染上其他病症，或找到实现死亡愿望的途径。你的问题在于生存意志与心灵机制。真正的医者会试图理解生命力的内在机制，并尽其所能学会激发这些力量。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The person within the photograph is beyond your reach. The you that you are can make any changes you want to in your experience: You can change probabilities for your own purposes, but you cannot change the courses of other probable selves that have gone their own ways. All probable selves are connected. They each influence one another. There is a natural interaction, but no coercion. Each probable self has its own free will and uniqueness. You can change your own experience in the probability you know -- which itself rides upon infinite other probabilities. You can bring into your own experience any number of probable events, but you cannot deny the probable experience of another portion of your reality. That is, you cannot annihilate it.
quotes.translation: 照片中的人物已非你所能触及。当下的你可以在经验中做出任何改变：你能为自己的目的改变概率，却无法改变其他已走上各自道路的可能自我的轨迹。所有可能自我相互联结，彼此影响。存在自然的互动，却绝无强制。每个可能自我都拥有自由意志与独特性。你能改变已知概率中的自身经验——这经验本身便承载着无限其他概率。你能将无数可能事件带入自身经验，却无法否定你实相中其他部分的可能经验——换言之，你无法将其抹杀。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is quite true that the inner ego is aware through the inner senses of any choices that the outer ego will make with the use of free will. This does not mean that decisions are in any way predetermined. It only means that the inner ego is not bound by the dimensions in which those free will choices are made.
quotes.translation: 内在自我确实能通过内在感官预知外在自我运用自由意志将做出的任何选择。这并不意味着决定被预先注定，只说明内在自我不受那些自由意志选择所发生的维度束缚。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: We touched briefly on this when I spoke of objectifying. The study of the dream universe will require a journey inward, through the subconscious and beyond. It will also require a certain objectivity, in that you must try to see your own universe then from the other side. This involves definitely a change of focus, and willingness to momentarily detach the abilities of both the intellect and the intuitions from familiar camouflage reference points.
quotes.translation: 当我谈及客观化时曾简要触及此点。对梦境宇宙的研究需要向内探索，穿越潜意识并超越其外。这还需要某种客观性——你必须尝试从另一面审视自己的宇宙。这必然涉及焦点的转换，以及将智性与直觉的能力暂时脱离熟悉的伪装参照点的意愿。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The first volume, like this one, defies easy description, then, since it leaps over many definitions we usually take for granted; and with its lack of chapter divisions it even confounds our ideas of what a book is. Yet it certainly contains a most intriguing, multidimensional view of the nature of probabilities, a view in which our ideas of a "simple, single event" must vanish; at least we can never again look at any event as being concrete, finished, or absolute. Seth stresses the importance of probabilities as they exist in relationship to a thought, an ordinary physical event, or the mass event of Homo sapiens as a species, and emphasizes the existence of probable realities as the understructure of free will.
quotes.translation: 第一卷与本书一样难以简单描述，因为它跨越了我们习以为常的诸多定义；缺乏章节划分的体例甚至颠覆了我们对"书"的认知。然而它确实呈现了概率本质最引人入胜的多维视角——在此视角中，我们关于"单一事件"的认知必须消融；至少我们再也无法将任何事件视为具体、终结或绝对的。赛斯强调概率与思想、普通物理事件或智人物种群体事件的关系，并强调可能实相作为自由意志基础结构的存在。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now this is the main thing I wanted to say this evening to you. Without wholehearted cooperation and willingness, then you will allow yourself to succumb to the problems others have brought you. With a willingness to help, you rise above both their problems and your own, and are benefited in other ways.
quotes.translation: 这是今晚我想对你们说的重点。若缺乏全心全意的合作与意愿，你们便会允许自己屈服于他人带来的问题。而若怀有助人的意愿，你们便能超越他们的问题与自身困境，并在其他方面获得裨益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Each identity has free will, and chooses its environment as a physical stance in space and time. Those involved in a given century are working on particular problems and challenges. Various races do not simply "happen," and diverse cultures do not just appear. The greater self "divides" itself, materializing in flesh as several individuals, with entirely different backgrounds -- yet with each embarked upon the same kind of creative challenge.
quotes.translation: 每个本体都拥有自由意志，并选择其环境作为时空中的物理立足点。参与特定世纪的人们正在处理特定的课题与挑战。各种种族并非凭空"出现"，多元文化也非偶然形成。大我"分裂"自身，以数个截然不同背景的个体形态在肉身中显化——但每个个体都投身于同类型的创造性挑战。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: We are also dealing with probabilities, and the information has to do with those data you finally accept as physical experience, why you accept it, where it comes from, and where those events "go" that you do not experience. All of this is connected with the genetic information that any individual receives from the biological bank that belongs to the species at large, and from the inner reincarnational bank.1 We will see that Ruburt receives the information that he needs at the necessary levels, so that the material can be verbalized. All of this is also intimately connected with those areas in which free will can be utilized, freely, to turn probable events into physically perceived ones.
quotes.translation: 我们也在处理或然性，这些信息涉及你们最终接受为物理经验的数据、接受它的原因、它的来源，以及那些你们未经验的事件"去向何处"。这一切都与个体从属于整个物种的生物银行接收的基因信息，以及内在的转世银行密切相关。我们将看到鲁柏在必要层面接收所需信息，使材料得以言语化。这一切也与自由意志可被自由运用、将或然事件转化为物理感知事件的领域紧密相连。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This is not meant in any way as any sort of reprimand, but merely as an example close at hand as to how expectation operates. Ruburt's disappointment then, was only superficial, because he knew that the decision had been made much earlier. The assessor, then, with his own free will of course in operation, nevertheless saw the property as you had constructed it. I will certainly not expect you at this point to believe me literally--
quotes.translation: 这绝非任何形式的斥责，仅作为就近说明期望如何运作的实例。鲁柏的失望仅是表面现象，因为他深知决定早已做出。那位评估者——当然也在运用其自由意志——所见到的房产正是你们所构建的模样。此刻我自然不会要求你们字面相信——
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The cells do not have free will in your terms. They have the innate capacity to form other organizations, but not while affiliated with you. To leave you they must change their form. To some extent you determine their "good health" within the framework of their nature. They also help maintain yours. (Pause.) In terms of consciousness, the entity or greater you knows as much more than you know, as you know more than your cells.
quotes.translation: 细胞在你们的定义中并无自由意志。它们天生具备形成其他组织的能力，但前提是脱离与你们的关联。要离开你们，它们必须改变形态。在它们本性的框架内，你们在某种程度上决定其"健康状态"，它们也协助维持你们的健康。（停顿）就意识层面而言，本体或大我所知远超你们所知，正如你们所知远超细胞所知。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Both men and molecules dwell in a field of probabilities, and their paths are not determined. The vast reality of probabilities makes the existence of free will possible. If probabilities did not exist, and if you were not to some degree aware of probable actions and events, not only could you not choose between them, but you would not of course have any feelings of choice (intently). You would be unaware of the entire issue.
quotes.translation: 人类与分子皆栖居于或然性的场域中，其路径并非注定。或然性的浩瀚实相使自由意志的存在成为可能。若或然性不存在，若你们对或然行动与事件没有某种程度的觉知，你们不仅无法在它们之间选择，更不会产生任何选择感（专注地）。你们将完全不知晓这个议题的存在。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: (11:21.) The individuals alive at such a time will also have a hand in such decisions, however. Once more, because you are self-conscious beings your beliefs regulate your reality. An animal knows unconsciously that it is unique and has a place in the scheme of being. Its sense of grace is built-in. Your free will allows for the freedom of any belief, including one that says you are unworthy, with no right to your existence.
quotes.translation: (11:21) 然而，活在这样的时代里的个人也会参与这些决定。再说一次，因为你们是有自我意识的存有，你们的信念调节着你们的实相。动物无意识地知道自己是独特的，并且在存在架构中有其位置。它的优雅感是与生俱来的。你们的自由意志允许任何信念的自由，包括那些说你们不配存在、没有生存权利的信念。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Hypnotism is a safer method to begin with than drugs, but hypnotism itself is not necessary if there is an inner willingness to explore the inner universe. The main barrier is the ego's fear of being subjugated, even as it fears subjugation imagined in death. If the ego can be made to understand that inner awareness, exploration and investigation will actually enlarge its scope of awareness there will be little difficulty.
quotes.translation: 催眠是比药物更安全的入门方法，但如果内心愿意探索内在宇宙，催眠本身并非必要。主要障碍是自我害怕被征服，就像它害怕想象中死亡带来的征服一样。如果能让自我理解到，内在觉知、探索和调查实际上会扩展其觉知范围，那么困难就会很小。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It goes without saying that in our methods the ego is changed rather completely but gradually in many cases, and only through its own willingness to do so. It recognizes its identity as a part of. underlined, the inner self. Therefore basically it has no need to fight the inner self, since it knows its survival is dependent upon this inner framework.
quotes.translation: 不言而喻，在我们的方法中，自我在许多情况下会被相当彻底但渐进地改变，而且只有通过它自己的意愿才能做到。它认识到自己的身份是内在自我的一部分（下划线）。因此，它基本上无需与内在自我对抗，因为它知道自己的生存依赖于这个内在架构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Your generation as a whole had to learn the importance of thought and responsibility. You had to learn that basically to hate is to kill. The lesson was a practical one. The Germans and the Jews made it plain. Had the hatred not existed in the Germans, it could not have been channeled as it was against the Jews. Free will operated here as always.
quotes.translation: 你们这一代人整体上必须学习思想和责任的重要性。你们必须学习到，基本上恨就是杀。这个教训是实际的。德国人和犹太人使这一点变得清楚。如果恨不存在于德国人之中，它就不可能被引导来针对犹太人。自由意志在这里一如既往地运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It was however I'd as quite sincere curiosity, and her open-minded willingness to perceive, that subconsciously caused Ruburt to agree to the session. The rapport existing as a rule between twins, and that does indeed exist, between Loriza, L-o-r-i-z-a and her twin （sister.）, goes far to account for Loriza's latent intuitive, but partial, inner comprehension of the elements that work within, say, telepathy.
quotes.translation: 然而，正是她相当真诚的好奇心，以及她开放的心态愿意去感知，在潜意识中导致鲁柏同意进行这次课程。双胞胎之间通常存在的和谐关系，确实存在于洛里扎（L-o-r-i-z-a）和她的双胞胎（姐妹）之间，这大大解释了洛里扎对内在运作的元素（例如心灵感应）所具有的潜在直觉性但片面的内在理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Ruburt was recently scandalized upon reading that orthodox science still does not grant man with volition. According to its tenets, any such feeling of conscious choice is instead the reflection of the brain's attitude at any given time. Yet I am saying that man has free will within the framework of his existence, and that all other species do also within the frameworks of their existences (underlined).
quotes.translation: 鲁柏最近读到正统科学仍然不承认人类拥有意志时感到震惊。根据其信条，任何这种有意识选择的感觉反而只是大脑在任何特定时刻态度的反映。然而，我说的是，人类在其存在架构内拥有自由意志，而所有其他物种在其存在架构内也拥有自由意志（下划线）。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The conditions of existence are largely determined by genetic structure. Free will must then of course function in accordance with genetic integrity. Genetic structure makes possible physical organisms through which life is to be experienced, and to a large extent that structure must determine the kind of action possible in the world, and the way or ways in which volition can be effectively expressed.
quotes.translation: 生存条件在很大程度上由遗传结构决定。自由意志当然必须与遗传完整性相协调运作。遗传结构使得物理有机体成为可能，生命通过它们得以体验，而这种结构在很大程度上必须决定在世界上可能采取的行动类型，以及意志能够有效表达的方式。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I have not touched upon some of these subjects before, since I wanted to present them in that larger context of man's origins and historic appearance as a species. I also wanted to make certain points, stressing the importance of dreams as they impinge upon and help form cultural environments. Dreams also sometimes help in showing the pathways that can be taken to advantage by an individual, or by a group of individuals, and therefore help clarify the ways in which free will might most advantageously be directed. So I hope to cover all of these subjects.
quotes.translation: 我之前没有涉及这些主题，因为我想在人类起源和作为一个物种的历史性出现的更大背景下呈现它们。我还想强调某些要点，突出梦境的重要性，因为它们冲击并帮助形成文化环境。梦境有时也有助于展示个人或群体可以有利地采取的路径，从而帮助阐明自由意志最有利的引导方式。所以我希望涵盖所有这些主题。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The fact is that when you insist upon evidence through the outside, regularly accepted senses, that you almost automatically turn off the inner sense apparatus. This is not necessary. Man to a large degree has set up this habit reaction. It is not a natural habit reaction. You must take the inner data at its face value, and this is what you will not do. Once you take this first step of spontaneity, you will actually receive evidence that even your conscious mind will be forced to accept. But the first step of such willingness must be made.
quotes.translation: 事实是，当你坚持通过外部常规接受的感官获取证据时，你几乎会自动关闭内在感官装置。这不是必要的。人类在很大程度上建立了这种习惯反应，这不是自然的习惯反应。你必须以表面价值接受内在数据，而这是你不愿意做的。一旦你迈出这自发性的第一步，你实际上会收到连你的意识心智都不得不接受的证据。但这种意愿的第一步必须迈出。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There must be a willingness, an acquiescence, a desire. If you do not take the time to examine your own subjective states, then you cannot complain if so many answers seem to elude you. You cannot throw the burden of proof upon another, or expect a man or teacher to prove to you the validity of your own existence. Such a procedure is bound to lead you into one subjective trap after another.
quotes.translation: 必须有意愿、默许和渴望。如果你不花时间审视自己的主观状态，那么当这么多答案似乎躲避你时，你就不能抱怨。你不能把证明的责任推给他人，或期望一个人或老师向你证明你自己存在的有效性。这样的过程必然会导致你陷入一个又一个主观陷阱。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: （Then, the feeling of crossed limbs developed in my hands. Although as I lay on my back with my hands at my sides, and knew my hands were so positioned, I began to have the feeling that they were crossed at the wrist and lying upon my waist. This feeling became most definite and unmistakable, and indeed stronger than it was in my ankles. Finally it became so definite that it required a formal act of will on my part to prevent myself from definitely moving my hands to make sure they were not crossed upon my waist.
quotes.translation: （接着，我的双手产生了交叉四肢的感觉。虽然我仰卧着，双手放在身体两侧，并且知道我的手处于这种位置，但我开始感觉它们交叉在手腕处，放在我的腰上。这种感觉变得非常明确和不容置疑，甚至比脚踝的感觉更强烈。最后它变得如此明确，以至于我需要有意识地运用意志力，才能阻止自己真的移动双手去确认它们是否交叉在腰上。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: （Seth has actually dealt with the God concept fairly often. This would involve such related matters as the soul, energy transformation, cycles on our plane, spirituality the "source of the source, " the Crucifixion, beginnings and endings, prayer and the will to be, etc. Among others see the following sessions: 3, 24, 27, 31,51, 62, 66, 81, 95, 96, 97, 115, 135, 146, 147, 149, 145, 151.）
quotes.translation: （赛斯实际上经常处理神的概念。这涉及相关事项，如灵魂、能量转化、我们层面的循环、灵性、"源头的源头"、受难、开始与结束、祈祷和存在的意志等。其他可参见以下章节：第3、24、27、31、51、62、66、81、95、96、97、115、135、146、147、149、145、151节。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The beaver is not free to make a spider web. (Long pause.) In human beings the genetic structure largely determines physical characteristics such as height, color of eyes, color of hair, color of skin--and, of course, more importantly, the number of fingers and toes, and the other specific physical attributes of your specieshood. So physically, and on his physical attributes alone, a man cannot use his free will to fly like a bird, or to perform physical acts for which the human body is not equipped.
quotes.translation: 海狸无法自由地编织蜘蛛网。（长停顿。）在人类身上，基因结构很大程度上决定了身体特征，如身高、眼睛颜色、头发颜色、肤色——当然，更重要的是手指和脚趾的数量，以及你们物种身份的其他特定身体属性。因此，仅就身体及其身体属性而言，一个人无法运用自由意志像鸟一样飞翔，或做出人体不具备能力的身体动作。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now these changes: let us speak of them. I have told you the very practical and symbolic meaning behind the painting and alteration of your physical environment. There is also more involved. As you know, your dwelling has always represented a temple to Ruburt, and the relationship between you. Therefore the alteration for the better represents his realization of a more beneficial relationship, and gives him a hand in it--represents his willingness to make necessary inner alterations also.
quotes.translation: 现在谈谈这些改变：让我们来讨论它们。我曾告诉过你们，在改造和改变你们物质环境背后，有着非常实际和象征性的意义。其中还涉及更多内容。如你们所知，你们的居所一直代表着鲁柏的圣殿，以及你们之间的关系。因此，向好的改变代表了他对更有利关系的认知，并让他参与其中——也代表了他愿意同时进行必要的内在调整。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: My material will be published. (Pause.) Probabilities always operate, and free will is always involved. However, I believe that you will be my publishers. I send you my best wishes (Long pause), and invite either or both of you here.
quotes.translation: 我的资料将会出版。（停顿。）可能性始终在运作，自由意志也始终参与其中。然而，我相信你们将成为我的出版者。我向你们致以最美好的祝愿（长停顿），并邀请你们中的一位或两位来这里。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You however do have free will, for while the entity's psychic structure can be compared to the body, it is a part of and inhabits far greater dimensions. All of this may seem to have little to do with your personal reality. Yet your daily experience is as connected with your self or entity (abruptly louder, briefly), as it is with the cells of your physical form.
quotes.translation: 然而你们确实拥有自由意志，因为虽然存有的心灵结构可以比作身体，但它属于并栖居于更广阔的维度。所有这些似乎与你们的个人实相关系不大。然而，你们日常经验与你们自己或存有的关联，正如与你们肉体形态的细胞一样紧密（突然提高音量，短暂地）。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now this development helps me, for I need his development in order that my communications be more clearly presented and received. Basically however all of this takes place in deeply unconscious layers. Abilities and energies are released. These cannot be willed however, on a conscious level.
quotes.translation: 现在这种发展对我有帮助，因为我需要他的发展，以便我的讯息能更清晰地呈现和接收。但基本上，这一切都发生在深层无意识层面。能力和能量被释放出来。然而，这些无法在意识层面上被意志所控制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Look at it this way: If someone tells you that pleasure is wrong and tolerance is weakness, and that you must follow this or that dogma blindly in obedience, and if you are told this is the only right road toward the idealized good, then most likely you are dealing with a fanatic. If you are told to kill for the sake of peace, you are dealing with someone who does not understand peace or justice. If you are told to give up your free will, you are dealing with a fanatic.
quotes.translation: 这样来看：如果有人告诉你快乐是错误的，宽容是软弱，你必须盲目服从这个或那个教条，并被告知这是通往理想化善的唯一正确道路，那么你很可能是在与一个狂热分子打交道。如果有人告诉你要为和平而杀戮，你是在与一个不懂和平或正义的人打交道。如果有人告诉你要放弃自由意志，你就是在与一个狂热分子打交道。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I do depend upon Ruburt's willingness to dissociate.12 There is no doubt that at times he is unaware of his surroundings during a session. However, this is no more binding upon him than autosuggestion. It is a phenomenon in which he gives consent, and he could, at any time and in a split second, return his conscious attention upon his physical environment.
quotes.translation: 我确实依赖鲁柏愿意解离的状态。12 毫无疑问，有时他在课程中会完全意识不到周围环境。然而，这对他而言并不比自我暗示更具约束力。这是一种他给予同意的现象，他随时可以在瞬间将意识注意力转回物质环境。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I am speaking theoretically, but those in the probable system, according to their own knowledge and capabilities, could also help your own system to avert disaster under certain conditions. This is rather an involved subject; and it would also be highly dependent upon your willingness to be helped. The race has called out before for help, and received it.
quotes.translation: 我在理论上说明，但可能性系统中的那些存有，根据他们自身的知识与能力，在特定条件下也能帮助你们的系统避免灾难。这是个相当复杂的主题；而且这高度取决于你们是否愿意接受帮助。人类种族过去曾呼求帮助，也确实获得了帮助。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Because you have free will you have the responsibility and the gift, the joy and the necessity, of working with your beliefs and of choosing your personal reality as you desire. I told you earlier (in the 636th session in Chapter Nine) that you cannot fall out of a state of grace. Each of you must intellectually and emotionally accept it, however.
quotes.translation: 因为你们拥有自由意志，所以你们肩负着责任与天赋、喜悦与必要性，去处理自己的信念，并按照自己的意愿选择个人实相。我先前告诉过你们（第九章第636节），你们不可能从恩宠状态中坠落。然而，你们每个人都必须在理智与情感上接受这个事实。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Man's will to survive includes a sense of meaning and purpose, and a feeling for the quality (underlined) of life. You are indeed presented with an evidential picture that seems to suggest most vividly the "fact" of man's steady deterioration, and yet you are also presented with evidence to the contrary, even in your world, if you look for it.
quotes.translation: 人类求生的意志包含意义与目的感，以及对生命品质（强调）的感知。你们确实看到一幅证据画面，似乎最生动地暗示着人类持续衰退的"事实"，但你们也同样看到相反的证据——即使在你们的世界里，只要你们愿意寻找。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Such a task meant that man must break out of the self-regulating, precise, safe and yet limiting aspects of instinct. The birth of a conscious mind, as you think of it, meant that the species took upon itself free will. Built-in procedures that had beautifully sufficed could now be superseded. They became suggestions instead of rules.
quotes.translation: 这样的任务意味着人类必须突破本能中自我调节、精确、安全却局限的面向。如你们所认知的意识心诞生，意味着这个物种承担了自由意志。原本完美运作的内在程序如今可以被取代。它们从规则变成了建议。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Your daily personal lives are touched, are changed, are created from the interrelationships that exist among those phenomena. So, of course, your mass world is also affected. You do have free will, and in a certain fashion it can be said to be dependent upon the nature of probabilities and the multidimensional behavior of electrons.1
quotes.translation: 你们日常的个人生活，都因这些现象之间的相互关系而被触动、被改变、被创造。因此，你们的群体世界当然也受到影响。你们确实拥有自由意志，而在某种层面上，可以说这取决于概率的本质与电子的多维行为。1
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: "They may have been 'cured' whether or not they had treatment, and gone on to lead productive lives. You do not know. A man or woman who is ready to die, if saved from one disease will promptly get another, or find a way of fulfilling that desire. Your problem there rests with the will to live, and with the mechanisms of the psyche."
quotes.translation: 他们可能无论是否接受治疗都已"痊愈"，并继续过着富有成效的生活。你无从知晓。一个决心赴死的男人或女人，若从一种疾病中获救，便会立刻染上另一种疾病，或找到实现那个愿望的方式。你在此面临的问题在于生存意志，以及心灵机制。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The progression in that system incidentally was not swift or certain. Individual development suffered in many ways. The problem of how to handle energy constructively was put in far simpler terms. There was less free will involved. The inhabitants of the system were far more fearful--so fearful that little change was allowed for.
quotes.translation: 顺便一提，那个体系中的进展并不迅速或确定。个体发展在许多方面都受到阻碍。如何建设性地运用能量的问题被简化成了更简单的说法。其中涉及的自由意志较少。该体系的居民要恐惧得多——如此恐惧，以至于几乎不允许任何改变发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Generally speaking however, no physical object can be constructed, and no action can occur, without what you are pleased to call suggestion. No action and no material object can be perceived without inner consent and willingness. Behind every action and every construction there is indeed what you are pleased to call suggestion.
quotes.translation: 然而一般来说，没有你们所谓的暗示，任何物质客体都无法被构建，任何行动都无法发生。没有内在的同意与意愿，任何行动和物质客体都无法被感知。在每一个行动和每一个构建背后，确实存在着你们所谓的暗示。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The act of writing the poem at this time, regardless of the poem's message, you see, represents a willingness to allow the spontaneous self expression. The message itself then doubly reinforces the suggestion. Even the emotion in the first portion, spontaneously expressed and creatively formed into art, is a good indication.
quotes.translation: 此时写下这首诗的行为，无论诗作传达什么讯息，你看，都代表着允许自发性自我表达的意愿。讯息本身随后双重强化了暗示。即便是第一部分中自发性表达并创造性转化为艺术的情感，也是一个良好的迹象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Free will as I mentioned earlier certainly does operate, but you must remember that while it does operate, personalities on your plane are extremely limited as to choice. They can only choose between alternatives with which they are familiar. They can only choose to operate within their own camouflage pattern framework.
quotes.translation: 正如我之前提到的，自由意志确实在运作，但你必须记住，虽然它确实在运作，你们层面上的个体在选择上极为受限。他们只能在熟悉的选择之间做决定。他们只能选择在自己的伪装模式框架内运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: We are not getting involved here in the free will or predestination question, though we have spoken about it, and we shall discuss it thoroughly in connection with time in general. Suffice it to say that it is more than possible for an individual to react in the past to an event in the future which may never occur.
quotes.translation: 我们在此不涉及自由意志或宿命论的问题，尽管我们曾谈论过它，并且我们将结合时间的一般概念彻底讨论它。只需说个体在过去对未来可能永远不会发生的事件做出反应，这不仅是可能的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The dog does not recall joyful appreciation of his own state of grace from a past, nor anticipate a recurrence in any future. With the large freedom provided by the conscious mind, however, man could stray from that great inner joy of being, forget it, disbelieve in it, or use his free will to deny its existence.
quotes.translation: 狗不会回忆过去对自身优雅状态的喜悦欣赏，也不会预期未来会再次出现这种状态。然而，凭借意识心赋予的巨大自由，人类可能偏离存在本身那份伟大的内在喜悦，遗忘它、怀疑它，或运用自由意志否认它的存在。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Some pessimistic scientists would say: "Of course," for man and animal alike are driven by their instincts, and man's claim to free will is no more than an illusion.
quotes.translation: 某些悲观科学家会说："当然如此，"因为人类与动物同样受本能驱使，人类对自由意志的主张不过是幻觉。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: To a lesser degree, you function along these lines in varying roles when you exist simultaneously as a member of a family, a member of a community, a nation, and as an artist or a writer. As you attempt to use your abilities so does the entity attempt to use his abilities, and he organizes his various personalities and to some extent directs their activities while still allowing them what you would call free will.
quotes.translation: 在较小程度上，当你同时作为家庭成员、社区成员、国家成员以及艺术家或作家存在时，你会以不同角色沿这些脉络运作。正如你试图运用自身能力，存有也试图运用他的能力，他组织各个不同人格，并在某种程度上引导他们的活动，同时仍允许他们拥有你们所谓的自由意志。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Animals also possess independent volition, and while I am emphasizing animals here, the same applies to any creature, large or small: insect, bird, fish, or worm; to plant life; to cells, atoms, or electrons. They possess free will in relationship to the conditions of their existence (underlined).
quotes.translation: 动物也拥有独立意志，虽然我在此强调动物，但同样适用于任何生物，无论大小：昆虫、鸟类、鱼类或蠕虫；植物生命；细胞、原子或电子。它们在与自身存在条件的关系中拥有自由意志（划线强调）。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your father's greatest vitality was in the inventor's reality, and so in your terms this one suffered. This does not mean that each personality, regardless of probabilities, is not endowed with free will, and so forth. Each is born, in whatever system, from a source gestalt energy, and develops.
quotes.translation: 你父亲最大的活力存在于发明家的实相中，因此用你们的说法，这个实相受苦了。这并不意味每个人格——不论或然率如何——未被赋予自由意志等等。每个人格，无论处于何种系统，都从源头的完形能量中诞生并发展。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The deeper explanations, however, demand a further expansion of ideas of consciousness, and a certain reorientation. It is extremely important that you bear in mind the importance of free will, and the presence of your own identity as you think of it. With that preamble, let me continue then.
quotes.translation: 然而，更深层的解释需要对意识概念进行进一步扩展，并需要某种重新定向。当你思考自由意志时，牢记其重要性以及你自身身份的存在极为重要。有了这个开场白，让我继续下去。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I would not, Joseph, take advantage, either of the hour, which is later, nor of you, nor Ruburt's willingness this evening, if I did not know that the action so involved would more than repay you. And the emotional qualities that we have achieved are also more important than you know.
quotes.translation: 约瑟，若非深知此行动将带给你超乎想象的回报，我不会利用此刻的晚时、你的精力或鲁柏今晚的意愿。我们所达成的情绪品质，其重要性也远超你的认知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This does not deny the free will of man, which is indeed misinterpreted. That supreme energy does indeed fight for existence in whatever form it shows itself; and justice, for your information, is only a human term, shortsighted at best. You would both do well to remember this.
quotes.translation: 这并不否定人类的自由意志——它确实常被误解。那至高能量确实以任何显现的形态为存在而战；而正义，容我直言，不过是人类短视的术语。你们二位最好谨记这点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Their migration is perfect in its simplicity and complexity, yet your journey as a species is far less predictable, opening avenues of probabilities in which your consciousness and free will allows you to become conscious creators in worlds that you initiate and then inhabit.
quotes.translation: 它们的迁徙在单纯与复杂间臻于完美，而你们作为物种的旅程却远难预测，开辟出概率的路径——在其中，你们的意识与自由意志允许你们成为有意识的创造者，在你们启动并随后栖居的世界里。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The field of probable events exists as a reality. From it the self chooses those actions which shall become a part of physical reality. Here indeed free will enters into the matter. This is a pun. I would be disappointed if it were missed. It is a good one.
quotes.translation: 可能事件的场域作为实相存在。自我从中选择那些将成为物质实相一部分的行动。自由意志确实在此介入。这是个双关语——若被忽略我会失望，这真是绝妙的双关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Do it as an act of will, and your intuitions, oddly enough, will be refreshed. They need not serve automatically as inhibiting factors unless you allow them to. But it is not enough in your case to ignore them and despise them. Let them work for you.
quotes.translation: 以意志力执行此行动，你的直觉反而会焕然一新。它们无需自动成为抑制因素，除非你允许。但对你而言，忽视与轻视它们并不足够，让它们为你效力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: But you find that you still overeat. In your mind's eye you still see yourself as overweight, imagine the goodies and snacks, and in your terms "give in" to your imagination -- and you think that willpower is useless and conscious thought powerless.
quotes.translation: 但你发现自己仍在暴食。在心灵之眼中，你仍视自己为超重者，想象着美食与点心，用你的话说"屈服于"想象——于是你认为意志力无用，意识思维无力。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Suggestion is no more and no less than an inner willingness and consent, to allow a particular action to occur; and this consent is the trigger which sets off the subconscious mechanisms that allow you to construct inner data into physical reality.
quotes.translation: 暗示无非是一种内在的意愿与同意，允许特定行动发生；而这种同意是触发潜意识机制的开关，让你得以将内在数据构建为物质实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Through such behavior the overall value fulfillment purposes and intents of the species are kept in focus, and those necessary requirements then planted in whatever space or time [is] required. Again, free will still operates in all such ventures.
quotes.translation: 通过此类行为，物种的整体价值完成目的与意图得以保持聚焦，那些必要的要求随后被植入任何所需的空间或时间中。再次强调，自由意志在所有此类冒险中依然运作。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your guest this evening did not merely happen to come upon your acquaintance, though free will does operate, as I have maintained. Nevertheless Roarck, Ro-ar-ck, also has his subconscious memories, and he remembers the times when we were together.
quotes.translation: 今晚的访客并非偶然与你相识，尽管如我所坚持的，自由意志确实在运作。但罗阿克（Ro-ar-ck）也拥有他的潜意识记忆，他记得我们曾共处的时光。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: (Slowly:) Chapter Six. Now: Any real discussion of genetic heritage must also bring up questions involving free will and determinism,2 and to some extent those issues must also lead to questions concerning the nature of the reasoning mind itself.
quotes.translation: （缓慢地：）第六章。现在：任何关于遗传传承的真实讨论，必然涉及自由意志与决定论的问题，2 而在某种程度上，这些问题也必须导向对理性心智本身本质的探讨。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In this existence you are physically oriented. Surely then the conscious physically oriented mind is the one that is meant to make deductions about the nature of physical reality. Otherwise you would have no free will.
quotes.translation: 在此存在中，你们以物质为导向。那么，有意识的物质导向心智，理应负责推演物质实相的本质。否则你们将毫无自由意志可言。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now, when you speak of free will you automatically think in terms of your own time sequence, for you are caught within it. Those who are not within it can see past, present and future, and the interchange of action.
quotes.translation: 现在，当你们谈论自由意志时，会不自觉地以自身的时间序列来思考，因为你们被困在其中。那些不在时间序列中的存在，能看见过去、现在与未来，以及行动的交互。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: I will usually ask to show my willingness. We will then close our session, unless of course for any reason you request that we continue. You may as well be thankful for the time when it is offered.
quotes.translation: 我通常会要求展现我的意愿。然后我们将结束本次课程，除非当然你因任何理由要求继续。当时间被给予时，你最好心怀感激。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: May I rejoice with you? You may put this in the record or not, you will not have children, for reasons that I have explained. It is possible within the realms of free will, but not probable.
quotes.translation: 我能与你同乐吗？你可以选择是否将此记录在案，你们不会有孩子，原因我已解释过。这在自由意志的范畴内是可能的，但并非大概率事件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: December. A connection with a willingness to go somewhere. Star shapes. The color white background, and a paper item, folded like a card, the center being a rectangular shape.
quotes.translation: 十二月。与前往某处的意愿产生关联。星形图案。白色背景，以及一件纸制品，折叠如卡片，中心为矩形。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Dictation: Next chapter (8). Ruburt received it correctly the other (last) evening: "Men, Molecules, Power, and Free Will."
quotes.translation: 口授：下一章（第八章）。鲁柏在昨晚正确接收："人类、分子、力量与自由意志。"
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now give me a moment. Probabilities always operate, and free will. I am merely pointing out the probabilities.
quotes.translation: 现在给我一点时间。概率始终在运作，自由意志亦然。我只是在指出这些概率。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: （"December. A connection with a willingness to go somewhere." We saw no connections here.
